mapper.select: SELECT skill_id, name, description, content, tools, enabled, domain, examples, max_iterations, user_id, cre_time, upd_time FROM agent_skills WHERE enabled = 1

SELECT skill_id, name, description, content, tools, enabled, domain, examples, max_iterations, user_id, cre_time, upd_time FROM agent_skills WHERE enabled = 1 AND skill_id IN
#{item}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_skills (skill_id, name, description, content, tools, enabled, domain, examples, max_iterations, user_id) VALUES (#{skillId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{content}, #{tools}, 1, #{domain}, #{examples}, #{maxIterations}, #{userId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), description = VALUES(description), content = VALUES(content), tools = VALUES(tools), upd_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_skills SET enabled = #{enabled} WHERE skill_id = #{skillId}
